title: Luffy on Amazon Lily: Rising Conflict
description: In the Amazon Lily storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #5 as the scene develops across pages 4–7.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: They made me out of clay...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's ruining the decor of this room.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Would you like something to drink?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Might I have a cup as well!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I can enter from wherever I want...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Yes, it is an invitation to war...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Your life will never be in danger.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hawawa!! She's just like a puppy...(C

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Now's not the time for that!!!
